recommendations.title: Sarfarosh
recommendations.overview: When terrorists kill a cop's brother and disable his father, he fights back against the smuggling of guns and drugs which plagues his country.

recommendations.title: The Shack
recommendations.overview: A grieving man receives a mysterious, personal invitation to meet with God at a place called 'The Shack'.

recommendations.title: Sweet Girl
recommendations.overview: A man vows to bring justice to those responsible for his wife's death while protecting the only family he has left, his daughter.

recommendations.title: Coffy
recommendations.overview: After her younger sister gets involved in drugs and is severely injured by contaminated heroin, a nurse sets out on a mission of vengeance and vigilante justice, killing drug dealers, pimps, and mobsters who cross her path.
